narrative:
Rochester Twp & Vil township has 560 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
